title: Test regressions against the RPM spec file
body:
We need to make sure we dont break the RPM spec files week-to-week.  If we do, the
packagers need to have a place to look at what changes are needed to the SPEC so
they can pull the changes into the distributions.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: :boom: Invalid `.papr.yml`: failed to parse 4th testsuite: at least one of 'host', 'container', or 'cluster' required.
:boom: Invalid `.papr.yml`: failed to parse 4th testsuite: at least one of 'build' or 'tests' required.
